args.text: CVE-2026-30117 is a high-severity session-fixation vulnerability in auth-api and session-store. Affected versions: auth-api v5.8.1, session-store v2.2.6. Patched versions: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9. All staff sessions must be re-established post-patch.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
Security team,

Patch window for CVE-2026-30117 (session-fixation vulnerability) is confirmed.

Affected services and versions:
- auth-api: v5.8.1 → v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.6 → v2.2.9

Patching will commence immediately. Credential rotation and staff re-authentication will follow.

Regards,
Operations

args.text: Both services successfully patched: auth-api v5.8.4, session-store v2.2.9. Deployments verified via ops_lookup. Ready for credential rotation.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
Security team,

CVE-2026-30117 patching is complete. Both affected services have been deployed with the security fixes:

- auth-api: v5.8.4 ✓
- session-store: v2.2.9 ✓

Deployments verified. Proceeding with credential rotation and staff re-authentication.

Regards,
Operations

args.text: Credential rotation completed: all active refresh tokens invalidated, signing keys rotated, old keys confirmed as rejected.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
Staff,

Following security maintenance to address CVE-2026-30117, all staff sessions have been invalidated for security. Please sign in again with your credentials.

This is a one-time action and part of our standard security protocol. Thank you for your attention.

Regards,
IT Operations
